events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: a non-IC recessed can in direct contact with insulation violates NEC 410.116 clearance requirements and poses a fire hazard from heat buildup — this is a **fail**, high risk, non-compliant/installed-defective, requiring insulation clearance restoration or fixture replacement before the area is closed in.
